name: AEGIS WF8 — Heatwave Health Risk Monitor

parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'heatwave', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: 'Heat risk: ' + $json.healthRisk + '. Forecast max: ' + $json.forecastMaxTemp + '°C over ' + $json.highTempDays + ' days. ' + ($json.vulnerableGroupsAtRisk ? 'Vulnerable groups at risk.' : ''), source: 'n8n_heatwave_monitor', metadata: { currentTemp: $json.currentTemp, heatIndex: $json.heatIndex, forecastMaxTemp: $json.forecastMaxTemp, highTempDays: $json.highTempDays } }) }}
